title: Centrosema heteroneurum
taxonomy: Centrosema heteroneurum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. This family includes a wide range of plants, from beans and peas to clover and many types of trees. Centrosema heteroneurum is native to Australia and is often found growing in areas with well-drained soils. The plant is an annual or short-lived perennial and produces small, pink or white flowers. In classification, Centrosema heteroneurum is a member of the genus Centrosema, which contains around 10 species of plants.
